title: Timeseries Matrix Request Payload (v0.1.1)
description: Payload for the getTimeseriesMatrix Tauri command.

sourceId.description: ID of the volume or surface to extract timeseries from

axis.description: Specifies whether to extract data from voxels (volume) or vertices (surface)

indices.description: 0-based linear indices identifying locations to extract timeseries from. For 'voxel' axis, these are flattened 3D volume indices; for 'vertex' axis, these are surface vertex indices. Each index will correspond to a row in the resulting matrix.

agg.description: Optional aggregation method for timeseries. 'none' returns raw time points for each index, 'mean'/'median' aggregates across the specified indices.
